---
title: "Reject reason"
format: html
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dashboardr::.page_config(accessibility = TRUE, crosstab_prefix = "reject_reason")
```

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Load dashboardr (includes dplyr, highcharter as dependencies)
library(dashboardr)

# Global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Bundle loader — reads the RDS bundle once, then extracts datasets by key
.load_bundle <- function(bundle_file, key) {
  if (!exists('.dashboardr_bundle_cache', inherits = FALSE))
    .dashboardr_bundle_cache <<- list()
  if (is.null(.dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]]))
    .dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]] <<- readRDS(bundle_file)
  if (!(key %in% names(.dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]])))
    stop("Bundle key '", key, "' not found in ", bundle_file, call. = FALSE)
  .dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]][[key]]
}

# Load data
data <- .load_bundle('dashboard_data_bundle.rds', 'dataset_small_0obs.rds')

# Data summary
cat('Dataset loaded:', nrow(data), 'rows,', ncol(data), 'columns\n')

```


This was collected via the comments in the chat.

If knowing the rejection reason is important to us, then this should probably be collected in another way and not only in the chat.

## Total breakdown by survey status reason

```{r total-breakdown-by-survey-status-reason}
# Total breakdown by survey status reason
result <- viz_treemap(
  data = data,
  title = "Total breakdown by survey status reason",
  value_var = "n",
  group_var = "reject_reason"
)

result
```
